list.defaultText: Unleash your creativity with Paint Canvas Art & Mandala!

localizations.en: Unleash your creativity with Paint Canvas Art & Mandala!
localizations.ru: Раскройте свой творческий потенциал с Paint Canvas Art & Mandala!
localizations.es: ¡Desata tu creatividad con Paint Canvas Art & Mandala!
localizations.pt: Liberte sua criatividade com Paint Canvas Art & Mandala!
localizations.hi: Paint Canvas Art & Mandala के साथ अपनी रचनात्मकता को उजागर करें!
localizations.fr: Libérez votre créativité avec Paint Canvas Art & Mandala !

list.defaultText: Keep track of all your subscriptions and trials with Subwise!

localizations.en: Keep track of all your subscriptions and trials with Subwise!
localizations.ru: Следите за всеми своими подписками и пробными периодами с Subwise!
localizations.es: ¡Lleva un seguimiento de tus suscripciones y pruebas con Subwise!
localizations.pt: Monitore todas as suas assinaturas e testes com o Subwise!
localizations.hi: Subwise के साथ अपनी सभी सदस्यताओं और परीक्षणों पर नज़र रखें!
localizations.fr: Gérez tous vos abonnements et essais gratuits avec Subwise !

list.defaultText: Check out other awesome apps and games by KuyuLabs!

localizations.en: Check out other awesome apps and games by KuyuLabs!
localizations.ru: Попробуйте другие отличные приложения и игры от KuyuLabs!
localizations.es: ¡Mira otras aplicaciones y juegos geniales de KuyuLabs!
localizations.pt: Confira outros aplicativos e jogos incríveis da KuyuLabs!
localizations.hi: KuyuLabs के अन्य शानदार ऐप्स और गेम देखें!
localizations.fr: Découvrez les autres super applications et jeux de KuyuLabs !
